movie.actors: Lori Petty, Ice-T, Naomi Watts, Don Harvey
movie.plot: A girl is among the few survivors of a dystopian Earth. Riding a war tank, she fights against the tyranny of a mega-corporation that dominates the remaining potable water supply of the planet.
movie.title: Tank Girl
movie.writer: Alan Martin (comic strip), Jamie Hewlett (comic strip), Tedi Sarafian
